infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Hermes attaches photos you pick from your library to your chats.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Hermes uses the camera to capture photos to attach to your chats.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Hermes uses Face ID to unlock the app when biometric lock is enabled.
infoPlist.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: Hermes lets you attach documents from Files to your chats.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Hermes reads and writes your Calendar events so the AI assistant can schedule, list, and delete events on your behalf.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Hermes reads and writes your Reminders so the AI assistant can add, list, and complete tasks on your behalf.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Hermes reads and writes your Calendar events so the AI assistant can schedule, list, and delete events on your behalf.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Hermes reads and writes your Reminders so the AI assistant can add, list, and complete tasks on your behalf.

plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Hermes uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice into chat messages. Audio stays on your device.
plugins.microphonePermission: Hermes needs the microphone to record your voice for dictation.
